block_02: We would like to inform you that July 4th, 2021, is Independence Day in the United States. Due to the holiday, IQOption’s trading schedule will be subject to changes.
block_03: For your convenience, changes to the trading schedule are highlighted below. All times are in UTC.
block_11: Note: Binary and Digital Options markets will operate as usual. Depending on market conditions, Over-the-Counter (OTC) assets may become available for trading.
block_12: Note: The FX Options market will open as usual, but may close early depending on market conditions.
